class.name: CheckButton
class.brief_description: A button that represents a binary choice.
class.description: [CheckButton] is a toggle button displayed as a check field. It's similar to [CheckBox] in functionality, but it has a different appearance. To follow established UX patterns, it's recommended to use [CheckButton] when toggling it has an [b]immediate[/b] effect on something. For example, it can be used when pressing it shows or hides advanced settings, without asking the user to confirm this action. See also [ToggleButton] which contains common properties and methods associated with this node.
